name: PayrollHold
description: Stores AED amounts held from payroll for a specific employee. Supports deferred leave salary and manual accountant holds with future release tracking.

employee_id.description: The unique ID of the employee in the system.

hrms_id.description: The stable payroll identifier for the employee.

employee_name.description: Snapshot of the employee name at the time the hold was created.

company.description: The company name associated with the hold entry.

hold_type.description: Broad category of the payroll hold.

reason_code.description: A machine-friendly code identifying the specific reason (e.g., UNDER_TWO_YEARS_REJOIN_PENDING).

amount.description: The AED amount currently on hold.

days.description: Optional number of days associated with the amount (e.g. leave days).

source.description: Whether the hold was generated by the system (AUTO) or entered by an accountant (MANUAL).

status.description: The current lifecycle state of the hold record.

origin_period_start.description: The start date of the payroll period where the hold originated.

origin_period_end.description: The end date of the payroll period where the hold originated.

release_period_start.description: The start date of the payroll period where the hold was released.

release_period_end.description: The end date of the payroll period where the hold was released.

release_report_id.description: Optional reference to the SalaryReport ID where the release occurred.

notes.description: Detailed notes or system-generated explanation for the hold.

auto_key.description: Deterministic key used for idempotent system updates of AUTO entries.

created_by.description: User identifier who created the record.

updated_by.description: User identifier who last updated the record.

updated_date.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.
